examples: The sea is an improbably pale turquoise.
He claimed, improbably, that he had never been there.
Michigan's subsidies, once considered improbably lavish, may soon be matched by Washington, DC.
' To demonstrate the point Vincente, a former dancer, executes a series of improbably graceful high kicks.
An almost forgotten face, scruffy with stubble, ranked No. 216 in the world, improbably climbing higher.
